arts.ttl: Middlesbrough legend Gareth Southgate becomes fourth England boss to be awarded knighthood
arts.sum: He guided Middlesbrough to the UEFA Cup final in 2006 at the end of a 16-year senior playing career, before succeeding Steve McClaren as manager when he left for England. He later played for Aston Villa and Middlesbrough, winning the League Cup with both clubs, becoming a legend at Boro for captaining them to their first and, to date, only major trophy.
